title: 2025 Annual Carbon Emissions Accounting Results
content: Company 2025 carbon emissions accounting: Scope 1 direct emissions 1,200 tonnes CO2e, Scope 2 indirect emissions (electricity) 18,500 tonnes CO2e, Scope 3 estimated at approximately 45,000 tonnes CO2e (precise calculation not yet completed). Data center PUE value 1.38, above the industry standard of 1.25. Purchased renewable energy electricity proportion at 32%. Compared to 2024, total emissions increased 12%, primarily due to business expansion adding 2 new data centers. Carbon neutral target: 2035.
author: Sustainability Department

title: Social Responsibility and Governance Status Memo
content: Social dimension: female employees 35%, female tech staff 18% (below industry average of 22%); employee training 48 hours/person/year; CSR spending 0.3% of revenue. Governance dimension: independent directors 33% of the board; ESG committee not yet established; information security ISO 27001 certified. No formal AI ethics assessment framework or committee has been set up. MSCI ESG rating: BB, below industry average of BBB.
author: Sustainability Department
